title: Tothis
content: {{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Tothis-TEA.jpg]] |name=Tothis |region=[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |sector=[[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] |system=[[Tothis system/Legends|Tothis system]] |coordinates=S-3 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes=[[Authority Guardian Corridor]] |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial{{InsiderCite|67|Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band}} |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest=[[Green Planet]] |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} '''Tothis''' was a lackluster [[Factory world/Legends|industrial world]] located in the [[Tothis system/Legends|Tothis system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. The [[Authority Guardian Corridor]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] connected Tothis to the [[Atchorb system/Legends|Atchorb]] and [[Kir system/Legends|Kir systems]]. [[Musician/Legends|Musicians]] [[Greeata Jendowanian/Legends|Greeata Jendowanian]] and [[Sy Snootles/Legends|Sy Snootles]] worked for a [[Time/Legends|time]] at{{CSWECite|II|155|Jendowanian, Greeata}} the [[Nightclub/Legends|nightclub]] [[Green Planet]] on Tothis. They were the only employees there who were not addicted to [[Spice/Legends|spice]], and in the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]],{{SW|url=news/slugthrowers-part-2|series=Slugthrowers: An Overview of Popular Music and Musicians in a Galaxy Far, Far Away|text=Part 2|nolive=1}} a conflict that lasted from [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], musician [[Evar Orbus/Legends|Evar Orbus]] visited the Green Planet while looking for members to join [[Evar Orbus and His Galactic Jizz-Wailers|his band]], ultimately hiring both Jendowanian and Snootles. ==Behind the scenes== Tothis was first mentioned in "[[Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band]]," an article [[Rich Handley]] wrote for the [[Star Wars Insider 67|sixty-seventh issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine, which was published on [[April 15]], [[2003]].{{SWArchive|url=community/news/2003/03/news20030317.html|text=Celebrate Jedi's 20th in ''Insider'' #67}} The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', authored by [[Daniel Wallace]] and [[Jason Fry]], placed it in grid square S-3. ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|67|Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band}} {{1stm}} *{{CSWECite|II||Jendowanian, Greeata}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Tothis}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Tothis |es=Tothis |nl=Tothis }} [[Category:Corporate Sector locations]] [[Category:Factory worlds]] [[Category:Locations along the Authority Guardian Corridor]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]]
